documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 4 dogfood feature-delivery ship stage. The supervisor swept every prior stage's artifacts (intake, plan, implement, review, report — all present, no uncleared blockers), staged the PR draft at work/timestamp-naming-conventions/pr-draft.md per Q3 (no auto-push; operator pastes manually), staged the canonical delivery report into inbox/out/2026-04-27-timestamp-naming-conventions-delivery-report.md per the notifier hand-off convention, opened work/timestamp-naming-conventions/run.log.jsonl with a bootstrap-only header plus a stage_completed event for ship, and advanced the feature index to current_stage ship with handoff to LocalUserAuthorizer / human_approval. pnpm run check:phase0a re-ran green.

deferred_items.rationale: The operator alone advances past the human_approval gate per Q3 and BOOTSTRAP.md Phase 4. The parent agent stops at this gate and surfaces the staged PR draft and inbox/out report for review.
gh pr create is the operator's manual action after human_approval clears; the supervisor authored the PR body in work/timestamp-naming-conventions/pr-draft.md for paste.
Migration write-mode (--write under TESSERACT_MIGRATION_GO=1) is the post-merge follow-up task; the PR draft Test Plan requires the operator to ratify that follow-up before any rename runs.
The librarian index stage runs after human_approval clears and the PR is merged; index refresh is part of the post-ship knowledge-curation sweep.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice delegates the ship stage to the named supervisor persona per §4 and enforces the §5 working-agreement constraint that no agent SHALL run git push or gh pr create automatically; bootstrap-only run-log header is tagged per §5.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps every emitted artifact dual-anchored, preserves the auditable commit lineage 1ca2afd → 7d7b62a → 635e5bb → ff57fb8, and surfaces the ship boundary at the human_approval gate without papering over the migration-write deferral.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies the Phase 4 ship-stage requirement (PR staged for human_approval per Q3) and queues the LocalUserAuthorizer for the next ratification step per PRD §10.
